iterations.theme: The Power of Self-Awareness, Resilience, and Authentic Living
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast is shorter than the minimum required length for a single iteration (35-45 minutes), so it is treated as one complete thematic block covering Tina Primorac's journey and advice.
